name: Kingsville Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pineapple juice, frozen orange juice concentrate, and lemon juice in a large pitcher.
2. Add sugar to the mixture and stir until dissolved.
3. Divide the mixture into two equal portions.
4. Pour 2 quarts of ginger ale over each portion.
5. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
6. Refrigerate the punch for at least 1 hour before serving to allow flavors to meld.
